Seaborne:Powers:AmberGemPower:Name: Amber
Seaborne:Powers:AmberGemPower:Descriptio: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn costs less and exhausts.
Seaborne:Powers:AutoCannonPower:Name: Auto Cannon
Seaborne:Powers:AutoCannonPower:Descript: Fire the cannon at the start of your turn.
Seaborne:Powers:CastPower:Name: Cast
Seaborne:Powers:CastPower:Description: Hooks a card in your discard pile. Each stack goes one card deeper. Removed when you Reel.
Seaborne:Powers:DiamondGemPower:Name: Diamond
Seaborne:Powers:DiamondGemPower:Descript: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains Wet.
Seaborne:Powers:EmeraldGemPower:Name: Emerald
Seaborne:Powers:EmeraldGemPower:Descript: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra buff or debuff stacks.
Seaborne:Powers:EnchantedRodPower:Name: Enchanted Rod
Seaborne:Powers:EnchantedRodPower:Descri: The first card reeled each turn is Imbued.
Seaborne:Powers:EvasivePower:Name: Evasive
Seaborne:Powers:EvasivePower:Description: Gain Slippery, but cannot gain Block.
Seaborne:Powers:FullyLoadedPower:Name: Fully Loaded
Seaborne:Powers:GemSlotPower:Name: Gem Slot
Seaborne:Powers:GemSlotPower:Description: Allows the Seaborne to hold one additional gem.
Seaborne:Powers:GildedPower:Name: Gilded
Seaborne:Powers:GildedPower:Description: The first time each turn you have 10 cards in hand, gain Energy.
Seaborne:Powers:IdolatryPower:Name: Idolatry
Seaborne:Powers:IdolatryPower:Descriptio: Whenever you play a card with a modifier, damage all enemies.
Seaborne:Powers:ImbuedPower:Name: Imbued
Seaborne:Powers:ImbuedPower:Description: Card gains double effect when a modifier is applied to it.
Seaborne:Powers:JinxPower:Name: Jinx
Seaborne:Powers:JinxPower:Description: Buffs and debuffs you apply are increased.
Seaborne:Powers:LoadedCannonballPower:De: Tracks cannonballs loaded into the cannon for Seaborne v0.1.
Seaborne:Powers:MasterbaitPower:Name: Masterbait
Seaborne:Powers:MasterbaitPower:Descript: Whenever you Reel, Reel one more card.
Seaborne:Powers:OpalGemPower:Name: Opal
Seaborne:Powers:OpalGemPower:Description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains Cast and Reel.
Seaborne:Powers:RubyGemPower:Name: Ruby
Seaborne:Powers:RubyGemPower:Description: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
Seaborne:Powers:SapphireGemPower:Name: Sapphire
Seaborne:Powers:SapphireGemPower:Descrip: Placeholder gem. The first suitable card each turn gains extra damage.
Seaborne:Powers:ShardyShrapnelPower:Name: Shardy Shrapnel
Seaborne:Powers:ShardyShrapnelPower:Desc: Cannon shots deal additional shrapnel damage.
Seaborne:Powers:SlipperyPower:Name: Slippery
Seaborne:Powers:SlipperyPower:Descriptio: Placeholder defensive keyword for Seaborne v0.1.
Seaborne:Powers:SorcererFormPower:Name: Sorcerer Form
Seaborne:Powers:TorrentsPower:Name: Torrents
Seaborne:Powers:TorrentsPower:Descriptio: When Waterwall deflects an attack, returns that damage to the attacker.
Seaborne:Powers:TrancePower:Name: Trance
Seaborne:Powers:TrancePower:Description: Enemy intent is interrupted while Trance remains. At the start of the player turn, loses 1 plus Trance Resistance, then gains 1 Trance Resistance.
Seaborne:Powers:TranceResistancePower:De: Increases the amount of Trance removed each player turn.
Seaborne:Powers:WaterwallPower:Name: Waterwall
Seaborne:Powers:WaterwallPower:Descripti: Blocks attack damage only if the damage is less than or equal to Waterwall. Blocks nothing against larger hits. Removed at the start of your turn.
Seaborne:Powers:WetCardPower:Name: Wet
Seaborne:Powers:WetCardPower:Description: This card can trigger its Wet effect when reeled. This does not count as playing it.
